title: Steak Knives Set of 6, Serrated Edge Stainless Steel Kitchen Knife with Ergonomic Handle, Dishwasher Safe, Rust-Proof
features: Quality Materials - The blade of this black steak knife is partly made of stainless steel, which has certain corrosion resistance and oxidation resistance, non-toxic and nickel-free, and is not easy to bend even when cut hard, suitable for everyday use. The blade is serrated, very sharp. Part of the handle is made of food-grade PP material by injection molding, please rest assured.

6 Piece Set - This set consists of 6 steak knives. The classic black color makes it great to use with other tableware. The blade has a serrated blade and is very sharp, making it good for cutting a variety of foods. It's an essential utensil in your kitchen.

Versatile - This set of steak knives is suitable for many occasions, the classic design and excellent quality make it extremely cost-effective, it can be used at weddings, restaurants, family gatherings, hotels or camping picnics, but also the ideal gift for friends and family.

Reasonable Design - We have designed a lightweight, modern and durable handle. It has a certain curve curve and grain, ergonomic design, and your palm perfectly fit, comfortable grip, improve the sense of balance and use.

Use and Maintenance - This steak knife is dishwasher-proof, which saves you time, and can increase its service life by drying and storing it after cleaning. Customer satisfaction is our aim, if you have any questions about this product, please feel free to contact us, we will reply to you within 24 hours. Welcome to LAZAHOME.
description: Product Description A Worthy 6-Piece Steak Knife Set Stainless Steel Blade With excellent corrosion and wear resistance, non-toxic , and extremely durable properties, this kitchen knife has a long-lasting sharp edge. Ergonomic Shank The handle is made of PP material injection molding, with a certain curve and texture, non-slip,perfectly fit with your palm and feel comfortable. Serrated Blade Incredibly sharp, with hand-polished blades on each side. It can cut food very well, giving you an excellent cutting experience. Classic Black Steak Knife Set The elegant and simple design is favored by most people. It can go with any type of cutlery you have. Good Thickness,Good Weight.
